overview.description: PostgreSQL Data-Driven Test with dynamic expected files
overview.name: Postgres Variations Test

postgres.comment: Create table and clear previous data for the current ID
Insert dynamic data to table for user id {{id}}
postgres.query: INSERT INTO test_news (id, title, category) VALUES ({{id}}, '{{title}}', '{{category}}');

postgres.comment: Read data from table using variations
postgres.query: SELECT id, title, category FROM test_news WHERE id = {{id}};
